NAME: Site Name
DESCRIPTION:
A unique name for a site that corresponds to a georeferenced point.
Examples include: “101”,“DFTC”, “Site 1”, “99AK180003”

NAME: Profile/Plot Name
DESCRIPTION:
A unique name for a single profile. This can be the same as the site name if there is only one profile at the site. For NRCS data it is the same as “Pedon ID”.
Examples include: “BZBS4”, “99P0544”, “Profile 1”

NAME: Profile Notes
DESCRIPTION: Additional notes about the profile

NAME: Layer Sampling Method
DESCRIPTION: Description of how the individual layers of the soil profile were sampled as genetic horizons, fixed depth intervals, some combination or other.

NAME: Profile Sampling Method
DESCRIPTION: Description of the methods used to sample the soil profile, e.g., quantitative pit, core, bucket auger, etc.

NAME: Observation Date
DESCRIPTION:
The date at which the profile was taken at the site.
Examples include: “2001-08-20”

NAME: Observation Date Accuracy
DESCRIPTION: Estimated accuracy of the observation date.

NAME: Part of a Transect Flag
DESCRIPTION:
Indicate whether this profile was part of a transect by entering "yes" or leaving the field blank.
Controlled vocabulary: yes_blank

NAME: Surface Vegetation
DESCRIPTION:
Describe the dominant vegetation at the exact location of the profile.
Examples include: “Forest with canopy dominanted by Pinus spp., Quercus dominant in understory, and ground layer of Pteridium aquilinum and Vaccinium spp.”, “Andropogon- Sorghastrum prairie with invading Juniperus virginiana”

NAME: Soil Taxonomy
DESCRIPTION:
The taxonomic classification of the soil profile following NRCS convention (http://soils.usda.gov/technical/classification/taxonomy/).
Examples include: “Coarse-silty, mixed, active, subgelic Typic Dystrocryepts”, “Sandy, mixed, frigid Entic Haplorthods”

NAME: Soil Series
DESCRIPTION:
The NRCS soil series of the profile (http://soils.usda.gov/technical/classification/taxonomy/).
Examples include: "Cowboy", "Rubicon", "Tawas"

NAME: Complete Taxonomy Flag
DESCRIPTION:
Indicate whether there is more taxonomic information for this profile by entering “yes”, otherwise leave the field blank.
Controlled vocabulary: yes_blank

NAME: Thaw Depth of the Profile
DESCRIPTION: The depth to the frozen surface of the profile. For Alaska sites, this applies only if sampled after August 15 and should be left blank if sampled before.

NAME: Profile Properties Notes
DESCRIPTION: Additional notes about the soil and surface vegetation profile properties

NAME: Sampler Names
DESCRIPTION:
The names of the persons who described and sampled the profile.
Examples include: “Johnson, Kris”, “Nave, Luke”

NAME: Profile Calculated Soil Organic Carbon Stock
DESCRIPTION: The data contributor's calculated soil organic carbon stock value for the site, cluster, profile or layer.

NAME: Profile Calculated Soil Organic Carbon Stock Type
DESCRIPTION:
An indication of which portion of the profile (organic, mineral, organic + mineral) is described by the contributor's calculated soil organic carbon stock at the site, cluster, profile or layer level.
Controlled vocabulary: ccon_type

NAME: Profile Calculated Soil Organic Carbon Stock Layer Count
DESCRIPTION: The number of layer soil organic carbon stock values summed to produce the profile total soil organic carbon stock.

NAME: Profile Calculated Soil Organic Carbon Stock Depth
DESCRIPTION: The depth to which profiles were sampled to quantify the mean site, cluster, or profile calculated soil organic carbon stocks.

NAME: Profile Calculated Soil Organic Carbon Stock Standard Deviation
DESCRIPTION: The standard deviation of the site, cluster, profile, or layer- level calculated soil organic carbon stock. (For layer soil organic carbon stocks, this may be based on analytical or sampling replicates of %C or bulk density measurements).

NAME: Profile Calculated Soil Organic Carbon Stock Method
DESCRIPTION: A description of the methods used to calculate (including any gap-filling) site, cluster, profile or layer soil organic carbon stocks.
